_note: DRAFT Igbo — pending native-speaker + clinician sign-off (see Igbo Seed Kit). Missing keys fall back to English.

buddy.greeting: Ndewo! Abụ m MobiCova Health Buddy. Jụọ m obere ajụjụ gbasara ahụike.
buddy.seeDoctor: MobiCova nwere ike ijikọ gị na dọkịta.
buddy.limitReached: I ruola ọnụ ọgụgụ ajụjụ efu nke taa. Biko lọghachi echi.
buddy.cannotVerify: Naanị ozi sitere n'isi mmalite ahụike a pụrụ ịtụkwasị obi ka m nwere ike ịkọrọ, enweghị m azịza doro anya gbasara nke ahụ. Biko gakwuru dọkịta.
